name: Mississippi Mud Bars2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together sugar, margarine, and cocoa.
2. Add eggs and mix well.
3. Add flour, coconut, and chopped nuts. Blend thoroughly.
4. Bake in a greased 12x15-inch cookie sheet at 350 degrees for 25-30 minutes.
5. Remove from oven and spread with marshmallow cream.
6. Frosting: Cream together frosting ingredients (confectioners' sugar, evaporated milk, cocoa, soft margarine, vanilla) until well blended.
7. When the bars are cool, frost them.
